$meta.focus: High Damage, Area Damage, Injuries, Bleeding
$meta.desc_note: VERBATIM game data (0.9.4.x). Fatal Strike/Finish `Em!/Tool of Execution/Make Space mapping is order-based.

skills.desc: Strike -20% WD, +80% Bleed, +25% Armor Pen; 100% pull if 1 tile away; damages an extra body part.
skills.dyn:
Delivers a strike with {-30+PRC}% Weapon Damage, +{60+STR+PRC}% Bleed Chance, and +{5+STR+AGL}% Armor Penetration.

Grants the strike a {80+STR+AGL}% (+ Knockback Chance) chance to pull the target if it's 1 tile away.

Deals damage to an additional body part besides the one hit by the strike.

skills.desc:
Two-handed axe hits apply their targets with -10% Block Chance, -10% Block Power Recovery, and -15% Max Block Power for 6 turns.

If the target's Block Chance is 0%, two-handed axe strikes against it grant -4% Fumble Chance for 6 turns.

Both effects stack up to 5 times.
Strike +50% Bodypart Damage, +10% Crit Chance to injured part (or limb). If Injury worsens/new: target -10% Max HP, 120% Bleed on part.
skills.dyn:
Delivers a strike with +{20+3*PRC}% Bodypart Damage and +{0.5*AGL+0.5*STR}% Crit Chance to one of the target's body parts with a Minor or Moderate Injury.

If the target has no Injuries, delivers the strike to its most damaged limb.

If the strike worsens an Injury or causes a new one, the target loses {7.5+0.25*STR}% Max Health (but no more than {15+STR}), and the affected body part has {100+2*PRC}% chance to start Bleeding.

skills.desc: 'Rampage' 10 turns, per stack: -10% Skills Cost, +4% Crit Chance, +15% Bleed, -3% Fumble; every 3rd strike +15% target Max HP damage (max 25). Tree skills add stacks (up to IV).
skills.dyn:
Activates "Rampage" for 10 turns:
-10% Skills Energy Cost
+4% Crit Chance
+15% Bleed Chance
-3% Fumble Chance
Every third strike deals additional damage equal to 15% of the target's Max Health (but no more than {20+0.5*STR}).

Using the ability tree's skills grants an extra stack of the effect (up to IV).

Basic two-handed axe strikes prolong the effect's duration by 1 turn (up to 10) but reduce its number of stacks (no more than once per turn).

Only one Stance effect can be active at a time.

skills.desc:
Critical two-handed axe strikes grant -15% Skills Energy Cost for 3 turns and apply their target with +10% Damage Taken for 3 turns.

Both effects stack up to 2 times.

Grants two-handed axe strikes +15% Bodypart Damage and +4% Accuracy if the target's Health is above 50%.

Grants two-handed axe strikes +10% Weapon Damage and -4% Fumble Chance if the target's Health is below 50%.
Strike +60% Knockback, +40% Bodypart Damage per Bleeding and per missing 20% HP. 60% chance injured parts Bleed. +5% Max Energy per Bleeding/Injury degree.
skills.dyn:
Delivers a strike with +{40+2*STR}% Knockback Chance and +{2*AGL+2*PRC}% Bodypart Damage for each Bleeding affecting the target and each missing 20% of its Health.

With {40+PRC+STR}% chance causes the target's Injured body parts to start Bleeding.

Then replenishes {0.5*WIL}% Max Energy for each Bleeding and degree of Injury affecting the target.

skills.desc:
Using "Rampage" grants +10% Bodypart Damage, +10% Crit Efficiency, and -5% to the ability tree's Cooldowns Duration for 8 turns for each enemy within 5 tiles.

The effect stacks up to 5 times.
3x2 area strike, +15% WD and +20% Armor Pen per Injury degree in area; no knockback. Hit: -5% Bleed Res 6 turns per enemy in area (x6). If kills: repeats once.
skills.dyn:
Delivers a strike to a 3х2 tile area with -200% Knockback Chance as well as +{1.5*PRC}% Weapon Damage and +{STR+AGL}% Armor Penetration for each degree of Injury affecting the targets within the skill's area of effect.

This strike can't knock back its targets.

Hitting a target applies it with -5% Bleed Resistance for 6 turns for each enemy within the skill's area of effect.

The effect stacks up to 6 times.

If the strike kills at least one target, delivers it again to the same area (but no more than once).

skills.desc: Causing Injuries/Bleedings: +5% WD, +4% Crit Chance 5 turns (x3). Hits vs 2+ Injuries: +5% Max Energy.
skills.dyn:
Causing Injuries and Bleeding with two-handed axe strikes grants +5% Weapon Damage and +4% Crit Chance for 5 turns.

The effect stacks up to 3 times.

Two-handed axe hits against targets affected by two or more Injuries replenish {-5+WIL}% Max Energy.
